candidate.description: replace priority casez forwarding mux with explicit one-hot lane matching and masked OR data selection
candidate.contract_boundary: data output equivalence is required only when exactly one forwarding lane matches; no-forward output equivalence is unconditional

power.unit: nW OpenSTA estimated total power under fixed global activity 0.1
power.methodology_boundary: OpenSTA liberty estimate under fixed global activity; not signoff power and not measured workload activity

proof_mutant.mutation: reuse lane-0 forwarded data on lane 1 while preserving the one-hot selector contract

known_boundaries: customer_ready=false; not promoted as a result row
helper-level IDU PREG forwarding mux only
forwarded data equivalence is one-hot-contract scoped because the original design emits X on no-hit or multi-hit data cases
no parent IDU, register-file, whole-C910, ISA, or workload claim
OpenSTA estimated power is fixed-activity methodology, not signoff or workload power
the sibling VREG forwarding transform is not packaged here because it regresses area and power under the same flow
